name: insurance brokers managing 5–15 clients tool
description: For insurance brokers managing 5–15 clients, missed renewals cause client dissatisfaction. We provide automated monitoring instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking policy renewals and changes in client risk profiles.
